# holistics_data_schedule (Resource)

A Holistics data schedule (Dashboard or QueryReport delivered via email, Slack, SFTP, or Google Sheets).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `schedule` (Attributes) When the schedule fires. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `source_id` (Number) ID of the Dashboard or QueryReport.
- `source_type` (String) Source object type. One of `Dashboard` or `QueryReport`.

### Optional

- `dynamic_filter_presets` (Attributes List) Dynamic filter presets applied before delivery. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets))
- `email_dest` (Attributes) Email destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_dest))
- `email_subscription_dest` (Attributes) Email subscription destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_subscription_dest))
- `google_sheet_dest` (Attributes) Google Sheets destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_sheet_dest))
- `sftp_dest` (Attributes) SFTP destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sftp_dest))
- `slack_dest` (Attributes) Slack destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack_dest))
- `title` (String) Schedule title. Defaults to the source title.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Data schedule ID.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `paused` (Boolean) Pause execution.
- `repeat` (String) Crontab expression (e.g. `0 4 * * *`).

Read-Only:

- `is_archived` (Boolean) True if paused because the source was archived.


<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets`

Required:

- `dynamic_filter_id` (String) Dynamic filter ID (numeric or string).
- `preset_condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition))

Optional:

- `public_hidden` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets.preset_condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--email_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_dest`

Required:

- `recipients` (List of String)

Optional:

- `options` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_dest--options))
- `title` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--email_dest--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_dest.options`

Optional:

- `attachment_formats` (List of String)
- `body_text` (String)
- `dont_send_when_empty` (Boolean)
- `include_filters` (Boolean)
- `include_header` (Boolean)
- `include_report_link` (Boolean)
- `preview` (Boolean)
- `selected_type` (String)
- `selected_values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--email_subscription_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_subscription_dest`

Required:

- `recipients` (List of String)

Optional:

- `options` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_subscription_dest--options))
- `title` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--email_subscription_dest--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_subscription_dest.options`

Optional:

- `body_text` (String)

- `include_filters` (Boolean)
- `include_header` (Boolean)
